context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60 on perch
context.usage_scenario: Randomly triggered from idle state (30% chance); plays for 5 seconds; spawns feather particle effects

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head turned toward body/wing area, beak touching feathers
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1: head turning toward wing, Frame 2-3: beak touching body feathers, Frame 4: head moving to tail area, Frame 5: returning to normal position

visual_specification.details: Head rotates approximately 45 degrees toward body; beak appears to touch body in frames 2-3; crest in normal position; one wing slightly raised (2-3px) in frames 2-4

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette and base structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (head turned vs forward), echo_sleeping (active vs resting)
